name: OpenClaw Guard
description: Protect workspace files from prompt injection in external chat sessions. Blocks read/write/edit of protected files and redirects writes to a sandboxed directory.

allowedBaseDir.description: Base directory for external session file writes. Writes outside this directory are automatically redirected here.

protectedFiles.description: List of file patterns (relative to workspace root) that are always blocked in external sessions. Supports glob patterns via minimatch.
